pi_items.source: Task scripts: setup_task.sh line 22, export_result.sh line 10; Task description specifies this filename
Task scripts: setup_task.sh line 23, export_result.sh line 11; Task description specifies PNG export
Task description line 6: 'The diagram must have at least 2 pages.'
Reference document generated in setup_task.sh specifies 5 processes: P1-P5. Process P5 is 'Verify & Install', not 'Install'
Reference document specifies 4 datastores: D1-D4. Metadata values are keywords/substrings of actual datastore names from the reference

Reference document specifies 4 external entities. Task description line 5 explicitly states: 'Draw 4 External Entities (Rectangles): System Administrator, Package Repository, GPG Keyserver, Installed System.' Metadata only lists 3, missing 'Installed System'
No explicit minimum edge count is stated in task description or reference document. Value appears in verifier.py (line 93) as a scoring threshold but is not documented in requirements

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 2-page DFD diagram of the APT package management system. The reference document specifies 5 processes (Parse Sources, Fetch Metadata, Resolve Dependencies, Download Packages, Verify & Install), 4 data stores (Sources List, Package Lists, Package Cache, dpkg Status DB), and 4 external entities (System Administrator, Package Repository, GPG Keyserver, Installed System). The diagram should be saved as apt_dfd.drawio with a PNG export as apt_dfd.png. Note: The metadata lists only 3 required entities instead of the 4 specified in the task description, and refers to the fifth process as 'Install' when the reference document explicitly names it 'Verify & Install'.
